value.found_quote: Claude Code by Anthropic | AI Coding Agent, Terminal, IDE
value.rationale: The page is Anthropic's official Claude Code product page, describing it as an AI coding agent that works in the terminal, IDE, Slack, and web, available on Pro/Max/Team/Enterprise plans. This directly substantiates the claim that Anthropic offers Claude Code, and it is presented as a current, generally available product.
